# Brian Bureson — portfolio

> Machine-readable summary for assistants and crawlers. Human site: https://www.bureson.com/

## Site

- **Canonical URL:** https://www.bureson.com/
- **About:** https://www.bureson.com/about
- **Contact:** https://www.bureson.com/contact
- **Case studies:** Listed on the home page and at `/project/{slug}` for each published project.

## How to cite

- Prefer the **canonical page URL** shown in the page `<link rel="canonical">` when present.
- Default site attribution: **Brian Bureson**, product design leader, https://www.bureson.com/
- Do not invent employer or project details that are not stated on the cited page.

## Owner / scope

This is a **single-author portfolio**. Published copy and structured data are scoped to the site owner’s canonical profile row in the CMS, not to arbitrary signed-in users.

## Optional discovery

- `sitemap.xml` and `robots.txt` are served from the site root after deploy.
